title: LevelZ Additions
description: A LevelZ addon for mods support.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1e4cdbbeb418b7cd732ab3b22d708fa7c11a461_0.webp)
This mod works as an addon for the LevelZ mod made by [Globox1997](https://modrinth.com/user/Globox1997), implementing compatibility with different mods and some vanilla items. In the gallery you can find examples. ☕ Consider buying me a [coffee](https://ko-fi.com/carptersers).
## ✅ Installation ### Required - [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) - [LibZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/libz) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
Recommended 1.20.1 - [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) - [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) - [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology) - [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) - [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) - [Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) - [Death Knights (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights) - [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) - [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors) - [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis) - [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) - [Knight Quest](https://modrinth.com/mod/knight-quest) - [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) - [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry) - [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) - [Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) - [Void Totem](https://modrinth.com/mod/voidtotem) - [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
Recommended 1.21.1 - [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) - [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) - [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) - [Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) - [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
## 🏗️ Under Construction
